tasks.build: deno check src/main.ts tools/build_browser_preview.ts tools/serve_browser_preview.ts && deno run --allow-env=DENO_DIR,HOME,DENO_AUTH_TOKENS --allow-net=jsr.io --allow-read --allow-write tools/build_browser_preview.ts --minify
tasks.preview: deno task build && deno run --allow-env=PORT --allow-net --allow-read tools/serve_browser_preview.ts --skip-build --no-watch
tasks.typecheck: deno check src/main.ts src/main.sdl.ts tools/build_browser_preview.ts tools/serve_browser_preview.ts
